description: The eCRM-001 model at /home/ga/Documents/OpenVSP/ecrm_unstable.vsp3 has had its horizontal tail planform area reduced to approximately 50% of original, compromising longitudinal stability. Determine the correct tail size to achieve a static margin between 10% and 20%, implement the change, and verify the result with analysis. Read the detailed specification and formulas at /home/ga/Desktop/stability_task_spec.txt. Use VSPAero VLM analysis at the flight condition specified in the spec to assess stability before and after resizing. When resizing the tail, scale span and chord proportionally to preserve aspect ratio. Save the final correctly-sized model to /home/ga/Documents/OpenVSP/stability_restored.vsp3. Write a report to /home/ga/Desktop/stability_report.txt documenting the baseline stability assessment of the undersized tail, your sizing rationale, the final tail dimensions, and the verified final static margin.
